pages.text: By ingesting a brew of radioactive spider venom you.$(br2)Spider sense:$(br)You can sense it if there are hostile mobs outside your field of view or projectiles coming towards you.

Wall climbing:$(br)You can climb walls.$(br)To make sure your not accidentally climbing up walls you have to be in the air for you to be able to do so.$(br2)Webs:$(br)If you have the Weaving effect when obtaining this power you are able to use $(l:myneheroes:armor_upgrades#web_shooter)the web shooter$(/l) organically.
